mapper.select: SELECT q.id, q.title, q.author_id, q.author_name, q.created_at, q.views, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vibe.qna_answer a WHERE a.qna_id = q.id) AS answer_count FROM vibe.boards q WHERE q.board_type = 'QNA' ORDER BY q.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vibe.boards (id, board_type, title, content, author_id, author_name, created_at, views) VALUES (#{id}, 'QNA', #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{authorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{authorName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE vibe.boards SET views = views + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT q.id, q.title, q.author_id, q.author_name, q.created_at, q.views, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vibe.qna_answer a WHERE a.qna_id = q.id) AS answer_count FROM vibe.boards q WHERE q.board_type = 'QNA' AND q.author_id = #{authorId} ORDER BY q.created_at DESC
